title: Query with DISTINCT does not fetch all distinct rows
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (c1 INTEGER, c2 VARCHAR(255), c3 DOUBLE PRECISION, c4 BLOB, PRIMARY KEY (c4, c3));
UPDATE t2 SET c2 = 'Updated' WHERE c1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT * FROM t2 WHERE c3 > 1.0;
key_bug_features: SELECT DISTINCT fails to return all distinct rows
